name: Mother, May I Murder?
overview: Terrifying true stories of mothers and their children when nature’s strongest bond morphs into conspiracy, manipulation and murder. Acts of greed, revenge and cruelty leave trails of torment and destruction across America.

trailers.title: Suburb Rocked By Attacks on Two Moms Who Are Best Friends | Mother, May I Murder? | ID
